metaData.Ingredients: Water, Octocrylene, Homosalate, Butyloctyl Salicylate, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Proplene Glycol Dicaprylate/Dicaprate, Acrylates Crosspolymer, Ethylhexyl Triazine, Acrylates/Dimenthicone Copolymer (and) Cylopentasiloxane, Lauryl PEG-9 Polydimethylsilxyethyl Dimenthicone, Polymethylsisesquioxane, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenol Triazine, Caprylyl Methicone, Polysilicone-15, Butylene Glycol, Punica Granatum Flower Extract, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride (and) Saussurea Involucrata Extract, Fragrance, Pentyene Glycol, Polyglyceryl-4 Isostearate, Bisabolol, Phenoxyethanol, Tocopheryl Acetate, Disodium EDTA, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Panthenol, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride (and) Laminaria Ochroleuca Extract, Ectoin, Sodium Hyaluronate
metaData.Key Information:
• Lightweight, non-sticky and comfortable
• Instantly cut thorough water and forms a protective barrier from UV rays on skin
• Quick dry formula allows sunscreen to quickly adhere to wet skin , ensuring it does not drip or leave white marks
• Works on wet and dry skin
• Free from alcohol, colorant, paraben and oxybenzone
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Shake 4 - 5 times before use
2. Hold can 6 - 8 inches away from skin and spray onto body evenly
3. Spray onto palm and apply evenly on face
4. For desired result, re-apply as needed or after towel dry, vigorous outdoor activity
• Caution:
1. Avoid inhaling mist
2. Avoid spraying into eyes
3. If accdientially sprayed into eyes, wash with water thoroughly
4. If irritation occurs, discontinue use ad consult a doctor
5. Do not spray directly onto face
6. Do not use on broken skin
7. Do not spray on naked flame and incandescent material
9. Do not use use near heat, flame, or while smoking
10. Do not use this product in well-ventilated areas where no electrical appliances are in operation
11. Do not incinerate or puncture the can even when empty
metaData.Storage Information:
• Directions:
Put in a cool, dry place
Keep out of reach of children
• Warning:
Do not store above 40°C or directly sunlight
